title: Retries, Idempotency, Compensation, and Recovery · Failure Case: Compensation
summary: Harden a loop that calls unreliable external services. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops compensation increment in a fault-injected recovery harness. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define compensating actions when atomic rollback is unavailable.
Checkpoint durable state so a process can restart without replaying completed effects.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
